title: Peruvian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy stir fry dish combining the spices of Peru with a silky twist. This recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.

ingredients.name: Silky tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the vegetables and cook until they start to soften.
Add the Peruvian stir-fry sauce and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the silky tofu and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro if desired.
